name: WarOfGods 2
short_description: Action RPG to rule the city with goddesses and pets. Protect and rule your city using a variety of creations including cars, bikes, horses, dragons, bosses, and more. You can summon bosses, summon the three goddesses, hire gun-shooting soldiers or workers.
detailed_description:
This Game is Open World Action RPG including Shooting and Racing.

WarOfGods 2, Modern World is the story of Greek goddesses coming from the multiverse world to the modern world, encountering various modern civilizations, having new experiences, and ruling the city with their pets. Each goddess has the abilities of a god, but as they experience modern civilization, they use a variety of modern equipment to rule and protect the city.

An open world adventure where you decorate and protect the city with Greek goddesses and pets. Experience various interesting events that occur when modernity and mythology meet. Enjoy exciting racing, shooting, magic power, explore the world with various creatures such as dragons, horses, and pets, and rule the city.

When you defeat the boss, you become a summon, learn the clone technique to summon the three goddesses, and summon soldiers to protect the city on the battlefield.

You can defeat monsters and enjoy racing in 7 areas including Miami, Tokyo, and Seoul.

You can enter the buildings of each city, perform missions, and obtain necessary equipment.

You'll get the game for early adopters around the late February or March 2025.

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Vietnamese, Indonesian, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese*, Korean*
*languages with full audio support
